title: Bundle Overhaul
description: A pack that makes bundles similar to bags, maintaining the vanilla style
body:
## About
This resourcepack modifies the texture of the **bundle** to make it look more like a **backpack** or a **bag**. The pack changes the look of all the different colours of bundles, trying to maintain the **vanilla look**.

## Features
- Retextured Bundles
- All coloured variants
- Vanilla friendly

![All the coloured bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28034a273cc4a34c6f7831c51d3ab61db020207f_0.webp)
